title: Kennebec County Probate Court
description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Most actively updated of the 16 pages found: lists an 'Administrative Weeks' closure schedule and recent fee-change notices.
